scripts.test:integration: pnpm run test:integration:disabled && pnpm run test:integration:enabled
scripts.test:integration:disabled: pnpm exec kill-port 3460 || true && NEXT_PUBLIC_NEXT_HYDRATION_SILENCER=disabled PORT=3460 playwright test
scripts.test:integration:enabled: pnpm exec kill-port 3461 || true && NEXT_PUBLIC_NEXT_HYDRATION_SILENCER=enabled PORT=3461 playwright test
